ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES country_data ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the region */,
  "petrol_tax" REAL /* Petrol tax rate of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the region */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_data" (
  "vehicle_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "paved_highways" REAL /* Length of paved highways in the region */,
  "population_with_license" REAL /* Percentage of population with driver's licenses */,
  "vehicle_registration_fee" REAL /* Vehicle registration fee in the region */,
  "road_safety_rating" REAL /* Road safety rating of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "petrol_consumption" (
  "petrol_consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each petrol consumption entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "petrol_consumption" REAL /* Petrol consumption of the region */,
  "petrol_price" REAL /* Average petrol price in the region */,
  "electric_vehicle_adoption_rate" REAL /* Electric vehicle adoption rate in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("petrol_consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_petrol_consumption_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_types" (
  "region_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region type */,
  "region_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the region type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region type */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the region type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_data" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Data accessed by the user */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of data exported (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "data_exported" TEXT /* Data exported by the user */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_categorizations" (
  "region_categorization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region categorization */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region being categorized */,
  "region_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region type */,
  "categorization_date" TEXT /* Date when the region was categorized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_categorization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_categorizations_region_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_type_id") REFERENCES region_types ("region_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_categorizations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "data_used" TEXT /* Data used in the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "data_used" TEXT /* Data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., bug report, feature request) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was applied */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., bug fix, feature addition) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)
